case_title: LUCIANA BERTUZZO VS. ILUNA BASQUE BAR RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BERTUZZO, LUCIANA AS TO DEFENDANT ILUNA BASQUE BAR RESTAURANT DBA MATTIN NOBLIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERTUZZO, LUCIANA AS TO DEFENDANT ILUNA BASQUE BAR RESTAURANT DBA MATTIN NOBLIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-29-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ILUNA BASQUE BAR RESTAURANT DBA MATTIN NOBLIA
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT, FILED. PER DEFT, CLAIM IS FILED IN WRONG JURISDICTION.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2008 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERTUZZO, LUCIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ILUNA BASQUE BAR RESTAURANT DBA MATTIN NOBLIA THE EVIDENCE AND TESTIMONY WERE NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT NOISE AT DEFENDANT'S BUSINESS WAS THE CAUSE OF PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ILUNA BASQUE BAR RESTAURANT DBA MATTIN NOBLIA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
